SizePage.description: Maximum number of items to return.

Count.description: Number of items returned in this page.

TotalItems.description: Total number of items matching the request (across all pages).

IdUserCreation.description: Id of the user who created the ressource.

DateCreation.description: Date on which the ressource was created.

IdUserUpdate.description: Id of the user who last updated the ressource.

DateUpdate.description: Date on which the ressource was updated.

IdSegment.description: Id of the segment related to the ressource.

IdBusiness.description: Id of the Business this Subscription belongs to.

IdOffer.description: Id of the Offer subscribed by the Customer IdCustomer.

IdCustomer.description: Id of the Customer who owns this Subscription.

IdCustomerBuyer.description: Id of the Customer who buys this Subscription.

TitleLocalized.description: Title of the Subscription in the language of the Customer.

DatePeriodStart.description: Start date of the current billing period.

DatePeriodEnd.description: End date of the current billing period.

DateTerm.description: Date when the Subscription terminates or was terminated.

IsTrial.description: Whether the Subscription is currently in a trial period.

IsPriced.description: Whether the Subscription has a price.

CountPeriodsNonTrial.description: Number of non-trial billing periods completed.

AmountUpFront.description: Amount of the Upfront fee, Setup fee or Initial fee of the Subscription in cents.

AmountTrial.description: Amount of the Trial period in cents.

AmountRecurrence.description: Amount of each recurrence in cents.

Status.description:
High-level functional state of a subscription, exposed to end users.

| Value | Description |
|---|---|
| Draft | Subscription is not started yet. |
| Active | Subscription is currently active — customer can access the service. |
| Suspended | Subscription is temporarily suspended. |
| Ended | Subscription is no longer active. |
| Deleted | Subscription is being deleted. |
Status.title: SubscriptionFunctionalStatus

StateSubscription.description:
Granular technical state of a subscription. Each value maps to a functional Status.

| Value | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| DraftCustomer | Draft | Draft initiated by the customer without completing signup. |
| DraftAgent | Draft | Draft created by an agent. |
| DraftDelayedStart | Draft | Subscription with a scheduled start date. |
| DraftDelayedUpgrade | Draft | Subscription replacing an active one on its next term. |
| ActiveRunning | Active | Currently operational. |
| ActiveDelayedUpgrade | Active | Being replaced by a new subscription at next renewal. |
| ActiveDelayedTermination | Active | Will terminate at next renewal. |
| ActiveDelayedSuspension | Active | Will be suspended at next renewal. |
| SuspendedAgent | Suspended | Suspended by an agent. |
| SuspendedNoPaymentInfo | Suspended | Suspended automatically — payment information missing. |
| SuspendedPaymentDue | Suspended | Suspended automatically — too many unpaid invoices. |
| EndedComplete | Ended | Time-limited subscription that ran its full course. |
| EndedUpgrade | Ended | Terminated after a plan change. |
| EndedTerminated | Ended | Explicitly terminated. |
| Deleted | Deleted | Subscription in deletion process. |
StateSubscription.title: SubscriptionStatus

204.description: No results. Response body is Empty

401.description: Invalid or no credentials passed in the request

Message.description: A message localized in your language.

403.description: The operation cannot be processed. The response contains a JSON error object with more information

Message.description: A message localized in your language.
